title: HSL Formation
point: Hindustan Steel Limited was established on 19 January 1954.

title: HSL Ownership
point: President of India owned HSL shares on behalf of the people.

title: Initial Purpose
point: HSL was initially designed to manage the Rourkela Steel Plant.

title: Bhilai Transfer
point: Control of Bhilai Plant transferred to HSL in April 1957.

title: Durgapur Transfer
point: Control of Durgapur Plant transferred to HSL in April 1957.

title: HSL Registered Office
point: HSL registered office was originally in New Delhi.

title: HSL Office Shift
point: HSL office shifted to Kolkata in July 1956.

title: HSL Office Final Shift
point: HSL office ultimately shifted to Ranchi in December 1959.

title: Bokaro Project
point: Initially Bokaro Project was under HSL.

title: Bokaro Steel Limited
point: Bokaro Steel Limited was incorporated in January 1964.

title: Durgapur Capacity

title: HSL Production Growth

point: Rapid industrial growth was a key objective behind SAIL formation.
